headline: Why Did MSTR, BABA, NKE Stocks Tumble To 52-Week Lows Last Week?
summary: Strategy, Alibaba Group and Nike shares slumped to 52-week lows last week amid declining Bitcoin prices, an accusation from Anthropic, and a series of price target cuts, respectively.

content.summary: Strategy, Alibaba Group and Nike shares slumped to 52-week lows last week amid declining Bitcoin prices, an accusation from Anthropic, and a series of price target cuts, respectively.

headline: Nike (NKE) Is Winning World Cup Business From Adidas Despite Ongoing Challenges
summary: Nike is gaining traction during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with tournament-related business outpacing rival Adidas. The company is using the World Cup as a key marketing window to reinforce its brand with global football audiences. This performance comes while Nike continues to work through broader operational challenges worldwide. Nike (NYSE:NKE) is getting extra attention at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as its football presence and merchandise sales stand out against Adidas. The company is doing...
